acceptance_checks.then: the hook SHALL be a silent no-op when .mcpServers["atlas-aci"] is absent from ./.mcp.json
acceptance_checks.verify_method: bats: no atlas-aci in .mcp.json -> zero docker invocations, exit 0, no stderr

acceptance_checks.then: the hook SHALL be a silent no-op when eidolons.yaml .harness.atlas_sync.enabled is false
acceptance_checks.verify_method: bats: enabled:false -> zero docker invocations; absent block -> fires (default on)

acceptance_checks.then: when wired+enabled+docker-present the hook SHALL spawn `docker run -d` with the EXACT image digest read from .mcp.json and a read-write /repo mount running `index --since`
acceptance_checks.verify_method: bats: fake docker shim records argv; assert @sha256 matches .mcp.json, -d present, -v <root>:/repo (no :ro), subcommand `index`, `--since` present

acceptance_checks.then: the hook SHALL skip the spawn when a container named atlas-aci-sync-<slug> is already running
acceptance_checks.verify_method: bats: docker shim reports the name as running -> zero new `run` invocations

acceptance_checks.then: the hook SHALL never block, never exit non-zero, and SHALL fail open when docker is absent
acceptance_checks.verify_method: bats: docker absent on PATH -> exit 0, silent; spawn is detached (-d) so returns immediately

acceptance_checks.then: the auto-sync step SHALL run on BOTH SessionStart and UserPromptSubmit
acceptance_checks.verify_method: bats: both HOOK_EVENT_NAME values trigger the step

acceptance_checks.then: harness_hook.sh SHALL remain bash 3.2 clean and shellcheck -x -S error clean
acceptance_checks.verify_method: cmd: shellcheck -x -S error cli/src/harness_hook.sh; no bash4 constructs

acceptance_checks.then: README SHALL document auto-sync as on-by-default with the harness.atlas_sync.enabled:false opt-out
acceptance_checks.verify_method: grep: README names atlas_sync.enabled and 'default'/'on by default'
